overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk corporate hangar from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring teal neon corridors, a spacious vehicle bay with parked flying cars, and ending with a flight through a neon-lit cityscape at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: teal-lit corporate corridor with recessed lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor with teal ambient lighting toward a glass door at the end

entered.detail: smooth teal-colored walls with metallic finish lining both sides of the corridor
bright white linear lights recessed into the floor along the corridor edges
continuous blue neon light strip running along the ceiling center
glass door with metal frame at the end of the corridor leading to a brighter space

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, futuristic corridor bathed in teal light. Recessed floor lights and a ceiling neon strip illuminate the path toward a glass door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor leading to main hangar

events.description: passing through glass door from narrow corridor into larger transitional space

agents.ego_description: walking through the glass doorway into a wider area with wooden flooring and visible ceiling pipes

entered.detail: metal door frame with glass panels now behind the camera
polished wooden or synthetic floor surface replacing the marble corridor
exposed industrial piping and ductwork on the ceiling
intense white light streaming from large horizontal windows ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the glass door into a transitional space with wooden flooring and industrial ceiling elements. Bright light streams in from large windows ahead, signaling the approach to the main hangar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic vehicle hangar with neon floor lighting

events.description: entering the main hangar space with parked flying vehicles and red neon floor strips

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive hangar, approaching the parked futuristic vehicles on the raised platforms

notable_agents.action: futuristic black flying vehicle with Arasaka logo parked on elevated platform
distant human figures standing near the parked vehicles

entered.detail: glowing red linear light strips embedded in the hangar floor creating pathways
geometric metallic ceiling with angular beams and recessed lighting
long horizontal windows emitting intense white light along the left wall
raised concrete platforms with steps for vehicle parking

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast, high-ceilinged hangar illuminated by red neon floor strips and bright horizontal windows. Futuristic flying vehicles rest on tiered platforms while the camera advances toward them across the polished floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking area with red accent lighting

events.description: approaching and circling the parked futuristic vehicles for closer inspection
red ambient lighting on walls becomes more prominent as camera moves deeper into hangar

agents.ego_description: walking around the parked vehicles, examining them from different angles before approaching the entry point

notable_agents.action: sleek black Arasaka vehicle with landing gear deployed, door opening as camera approaches
security guard standing near the vehicle stairs

entered.detail: stairs with glowing red edges leading up to vehicle platform
large wall featuring abstract red illuminated patterns or digital art
circular platform with textured surface where vehicles rest

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the parked vehicles, circling around them in the hangar. Red-lit stairs and a large wall with red digital patterns become visible as the camera approaches the vehicle entry point where a guard stands nearby.

events.description: entering the futuristic vehicle as the door opens and camera steps inside
vehicle door closes behind, blocking view of the hangar completely

agents.ego_description: stepping into the luxury vehicle cabin and moving toward the seats

entered.detail: luxurious gray leather seats with red stitching arranged in facing configuration
central table with glowing red holographic display and control interface
warm wall-mounted lights inside the vehicle cabin

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the luxury vehicle cabin, revealing plush leather seats and a central console with red holographic displays. The door closes behind, enclosing the view within the dimly lit, sophisticated interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying vehicle interior with city view

events.description: vehicle takes off from hangar and begins flying through the city at high speed
view transitions from hangar interior to open night cityscape visible through window

agents.ego_description: seated inside the flying vehicle observing the cityscape through the window as the vehicle flies through the neon-lit urban environment

notable_agents.action: other flying vehicle with blue thrusters visible outside the window
flying vehicle with orange glow passing by in the distance

entered.detail: tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the vehicle window
bright neon billboards and signage on building facades
metal frame of the vehicle window showing the exterior view

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes off and flies through a dense cyberpunk cityscape at night. Through the window, towering skyscrapers with neon billboards and other flying vehicles are visible against the dark sky, while the interior seats remain visible in the periphery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile corporate interior into the expansive neon-lit skyline of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding through a narrow, teal-lit corridor with recessed floor lighting before passing through a glass door into a transitional space of wooden floors and industrial ceilings. As the camera advances, the scene opens into a vast, high-ceilinged hangar where red neon strips illuminate tiered platforms of parked flying vehicles. The movement then circles these vehicles and passes a guard by a red digital wall, shifting seamlessly into the plush leather interior of a luxury cabin as the door closes. Finally, the perspective transitions from the dimly lit cabin to a flight through a dense cyberpunk cityscape, soaring past towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards under a dark night sky.
